headline: Quantum-Si (NASDAQ: QSI) plans 2026 virtual meeting and pay vote
summary: Quantum-Si (NASDAQ: QSI) will hold its fully virtual 2026 annual shareholder meeting on May 15, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern, where stockholders will vote on electing ten directors, ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, and approving a non-binding advisory say-on-pay for named executive officers.
